recent_examples.quote: Don't bother me anymore on the phone. Send me an email or send a hard copy of how your company can help me with my, electric bill.
They never called me on the night that they were supposed to call, and then they called me, like, two days later.
I don't know if you got somebody on your end of it that's causing problems or what.
I've I've been through this a couple of times before, and I keep trying to get information, and I can't get it. This is like it's very frustrating.
